product_description: BrainPOP ELL is an online English language learning program designed for students of all ages. It utilizes short, animated movies, games, quizzes, and interactive features to develop vocabulary, grammar, reading, writing, speaking, and listening skills. The program aims to teach English to new language learners in an accessible and engaging way.

vendor_resources.justification: Official accessibility statement detailing BrainPOP's commitment to WCAG 2.1 Level AA and Section 508, listing general features like screen reader support, keyboard navigation, captions, and audio descriptions, and mentioning per-product VPATs.

acr_reports.title: BrainPOP LLC Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG Edition
